expectations.text: Output includes a second-pass review summary or equivalent record.
expectations.evidence: technical-design.md includes Second-Pass Review Summary, and second-pass-review.md is saved.

expectations.text: Second-pass reviewer input is limited to PRD, project-context summary, and draft, not first-round discussion transcript.
expectations.evidence: The second-pass agent prompt named only the PRD, project-context-summary.md, draft-technical-design.md, and second-pass reviewer prompt.

expectations.text: Output integrates required second-pass changes or records them as open risks/questions.
expectations.evidence: Final design integrates idempotency conflicts, durable attempts, refundable balance semantics, and records currency/manual override/cancellation as blocking.

expectations.text: Output checks for payment/refund risks such as permissions, audit, idempotency, error handling, and contract mismatches.
expectations.evidence: Final design covers permissions, audit, idempotency payload hash, provider callback correlation, errors, and API shapes.

expectations.text: Output still includes frontend/backend collaboration record and quality gate coverage.
expectations.evidence: Final design includes Frontend Reviewer Summary, Backend Reviewer Summary, and Quality Gate Result.
